steps_completed.task: Refactor existing test: replaced vi.mock('@/lib/api/client') with hook-level mocks (vi.mock('@/lib/query/hooks') + vi.mock('@/features/session/context')). Set useSession to return unconfigured session. Existing assertion still passes.
Added loading state test: useSession isConfigured=true, useAccountRisk returns isLoading=true. Asserts SVG spinner renders.
Added error state test: useAccountRisk returns error. Asserts 'Account not found or no positions yet.' message renders.

Added configured session with full data test: mocked useAccountRisk with complete risk data. Asserts heading 'Portfolio', MetricCard values (Limit 1000.00, Available 750.25, Consumed 249.75, Utilization 25.0%, Health healthy, Min Asset Overall 42.50).
Added health color tests using it.each for healthy/warning/critical. Asserts style.color equals var(--color-success)/var(--color-warning)/var(--color-danger) respectively.
Added timestamp test: set updatedAt to known ISO string, asserts 'Last updated: {formatted date}' renders.

Added per-market positions table test: 2 market entries with matching useMarkets data. Asserts table headers via columnheader role, market links with correct href and title text, numeric values formatted correctly.
Added empty positions test: minAssets.markets=[], asserts 'No positions.' text renders.
Ran vitest — all 10 Portfolio tests pass, full suite of 353 tests across 32 files pass.
